summary: Comprehensive testing of User Accounts & Favorites feature completed. All backend APIs working (100% - 20/20 tests). All frontend UI flows working correctly: login modal, registration, user menu, logout, favorites page, add/remove favorites from range detail page, Google OAuth redirect.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all user auth and favorites features working)

seed_data_creation: Test users created during registration tests. Test user 'testuser@example.com' already existed in database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: User Accounts & Favorites feature fully tested and working. Auth endpoints: POST /api/auth/register (create user), POST /api/auth/login (login), GET /api/auth/me (get current user), POST /api/auth/google/callback (Google OAuth). Favorites endpoints: POST /api/favorites/{range_id} (add), DELETE /api/favorites/{range_id} (remove), GET /api/favorites (list), GET /api/favorites/check/{range_id} (check status). JWT tokens stored in localStorage as 'userToken'. Google OAuth redirects to auth.emergentagent.com and returns to /auth/callback with session_id in URL hash.
